title: Optimizing Web Font Loading for Flawless UI & User Experience with CSS `font-display`
tweet: Eliminate FOIT/FOUT and create a seamless UI! Dive deep into CSS `font-display` strategies to optimize web font loading, boost performance, and enhance #UXDesign. A must-read for #CSSTypography experts! #WebFonts #Performance
tip: Leverage `font-display: optional` for the best perceived performance on non-critical brand fonts. While `swap` quickly displays fallback text then swaps to the custom font (potentially causing a layout shift), `optional` will only use the custom font if it's available immediately or from cache. Otherwise, it sticks with the system font, preventing layout shifts and improving Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) scores, crucial for a smooth user experience.
